2606.08769.title: RadOT-Eval: Auditable Structured-Evidence Transport for Radiology Report Evaluation
2606.08769.paper_summary: Automatic evaluation is critical for high-stakes text generation, where errors often involve omitted findings, hallucinated content, polarity reversals, location changes, uncertainty mismatches, and temporal-comparison errors rather than low surface similarity alone. Radiology report generation provides a challenging test case because generated reports must preserve structured clinical evidence across sources. We present RadOT-Eval, an interpretable structured-evidence optimal transport framework for offline auditing of radiology report generation. RadOT-Eval decomposes reference and candidate reports into attribute-structured clinical evidence units, aligns corresponding evidence using entropy-regularized optimal transport, and uses clinically meaningful side-channel discrepancies in a monotone risk model to predict error burden. All transport, feature, and readout choices are selected using the ReXVal dataset, and the frozen system is evaluated on the independent RadEvalX dataset. RadOT-Eval achieves Spearman correlations of 0.715, 0.548, and 0.399 with total, clinically significant, and clinically insignificant annotated error burden, respectively, yielding higher point estimates than standard evaluation metrics and the open-source large language model (LLM)-based evaluator GREEN-radllama2-7B. In a frozen auxiliary corruption-sensitivity stress test on ReXErr-v1, RadOT-Eval achieves 0.768 AUROC and a 0.990 corrupted-greater-than-clean paired win rate. These results show that structured evidence transport provides an auditable, rank-oriented evaluation tool for high-stakes generated clinical text under ReXVal-only model selection and frozen RadEvalX testing.
2606.08769.paper_summary_zh: 自動評估對於高風險文本生成至關重要，因為錯誤通常涉及遺漏的發現、幻覺內容、極性反轉、位置變更、不確定性不匹配以及時間比較錯誤，而不僅僅是低表面相似性。放射科報告生成提供了一個具有挑戰性的測試案例，因為生成的報告必須在不同來源之間保留結構化的臨床證據。我們提出了RadOT-Eval，這是一個可解釋的結構證據最佳運輸框架，用於放射科報告生成的離線審計。RadOT-Eval將參考報告和候選報告分解為屬性結構的臨床證據單元，使用熵正則化的最佳運輸對應證據進行對齊，並在單調風險模型中使用臨床意義的側通道差異來預測錯誤負擔。所有運輸、特徵和讀取選擇均使用ReXVal數據集進行選擇，並在獨立的RadEvalX數據集上評估冷凍系統。RadOT-Eval在總體、臨床顯著和臨床不顯著的註釋錯誤負擔上分別達到0.715、0.548和0.399的斯皮爾曼相關性，產生的點估計高於標準評估指標和基於開源大型語言模型（LLM）的評估器GREEN-radllama2-7B。在對ReXErr-v1的冷凍輔助腐敗敏感性壓力測試中，RadOT-Eval達到0.768的AUROC和0.990的腐敗大於乾淨的配對勝率。這些結果表明，結構證據運輸為在僅使用ReXVal模型選擇和冷凍RadEvalX測試下的高風險生成臨床文本提供了一種可審計的、以排名為導向的評估工具。
2606.08769.author: Weixin Liu et.al.
2606.08769.authors: Weixin Liu, Juming Xiong, Yang Li, Qingyuan Song, Susannah Rose, Murat Kantarcioglu, Bradley Malin, Zhijun Yin
